shortDescription: Immigration NZ · Fee Paying Student · Offer of Place · Genuine student

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Fee Paying Student Visa fee (NZD $485 approx for online) on immigration.govt.nz before quoting.

alert.title: Genuine student assessment
alert.body: Immigration NZ assesses whether applicant is genuine student with credible study plan. Course mismatch with background is a common refusal factor.

about.label: Description
about.value: Fee Paying Student Visa for full-time study at an approved New Zealand education provider. Applied online via Immigration NZ with Offer of Place from institution.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Offer of Place from approved provider · Proof of funds · Genuine student intent · Health and character requirements · English proficiency

about.label: Financial requirement
about.value: Tuition plus NZD $20,000 per year living costs (approx—verify current amount on immigration.govt.nz).

about.label: After approval
about.value: Maintain enrolment and visa conditions. Limited work rights during study. Discuss post-study work visa separately.

eligibility.criterion: Offer of Place from approved provider

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, review INZ letter and strengthen genuine student evidence before reapplication with new Offer of Place.

redFlags.title: Weak genuine student case
redFlags.description: Course unrelated to background without explanation.
redFlags.fix: Clear study rationale linking prior education/work to NZ program

redFlags.title: Insufficient funds
redFlags.description: Amount below INZ threshold or unseasoned deposits.
redFlags.fix: Meet tuition + living requirement; sponsor ITR; loan evidence

redFlags.title: Offer of Place issues
redFlags.fix: Verify provider on NZQA; request updated offer

redFlags.title: Medical not completed
redFlags.description: INZ requested medical but client delayed.

redFlags.title: Prior refusals not disclosed
redFlags.description: NZ or other country refusals hidden.

redFlags.title: English below requirement
redFlags.description: Scores below provider or INZ minimum.

faqs.q: Can we guarantee student visa approval?
faqs.a: No. INZ assesses each application. Strong documentation improves chances but approval is never guaranteed.
Remaining tuition plus approx NZD $20,000/year living costs—verify current INZ financial requirements.
Partner may apply for partner of student visa if relationship genuine and funds adequate—assess case-by-case.
Limited work hours during study—verify current INZ conditions.
After Offer of Place; allow processing time before course start.
Depends on course length and INZ requirements—follow instructions if medical requested.
Discuss Post Study Work Visa eligibility based on qualification level.
Most applications online via Immigration NZ portal.

compliance: Client service agreement on file before submission
Offer of Place must be from approved provider
proTips: Draft genuine student statement before apply
Book medical early if INZ requests
postApproval: Send visa approval and conditions to client

relatedServices.label: New Zealand – Post Study Work Visa

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial NZ student visa counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: INZ living costs amount updates—always verify on immigration.govt.nz before funds check.

quiz.question: Living costs funds approx per year:

donts: Do not apply with expired offer
Do not quote outdated fund amounts
